account_created.title: Welcome to Mentora
account_created.body: Your account has been created successfully. Complete your profile to get started.

email_verification.title: Verify your email
email_verification.body: Please verify your email address to activate your account.

password_reset.title: Password reset requested
password_reset.body: A password reset was requested for your account. If this wasn't you, secure your account now.

new_device_login.title: New device sign-in
new_device_login.body: Your account was just accessed from a new device. If this wasn't you, change your password immediately.

account_suspended.title: Account suspended
account_suspended.body: Your account has been suspended. Contact support for more information.

account_unsuspended.title: Account reinstated
account_unsuspended.body: Your account has been reinstated. Welcome back.

two_factor_locked.title: Account temporarily locked
two_factor_locked.body: Too many failed verification attempts. Your account is temporarily locked.

kyc_submitted.title: Verification documents received
kyc_submitted.body: We received your identity documents. We'll notify you once the review is complete.

kyc_identity_approved.title: Identity verified
kyc_identity_approved.body: Your identity has been verified. A few more steps remain to complete your verification.

kyc_approved.title: Verification approved
kyc_approved.body: Congratulations — your verification is complete. You now have full access.

kyc_rejected.title: Verification not approved
kyc_rejected.body: Your verification could not be approved. Check the feedback and submit again.

kyc_sla_breach.title: Verification is taking longer than usual
kyc_sla_breach.body: Your verification review is taking longer than expected. Thank you for your patience.

kyc_banned.title: Verification permanently declined
kyc_banned.body: Your verification has been permanently declined. Contact support if you believe this is an error.

kyc_reverification_required.title: Re-verification required
kyc_reverification_required.body: We need you to verify your identity again to keep your account active.

booking_requested.title: New booking request
booking_requested.body: You have a new booking request awaiting your response.

booking_cancelled_by_tutor.title: Booking cancelled by tutor
booking_cancelled_by_tutor.body: Your tutor cancelled the booking. You will not be charged.

booking_cancelled_by_parent.title: Booking cancelled
booking_cancelled_by_parent.body: The booking was cancelled by the parent.

booking_cancelled_unpaid.title: Booking cancelled — payment not received
booking_cancelled_unpaid.body: The booking was cancelled because payment was not completed in time.

payment_window_reminder.title: Payment reminder
payment_window_reminder.body: Your booking is reserved but unpaid. Complete payment to confirm it.

reschedule_requested.title: Reschedule requested
reschedule_requested.body: A reschedule has been requested for your session.

reschedule_rejected.title: Reschedule declined
reschedule_rejected.body: Your reschedule request was declined. The original time still stands.

session_reminder_24hr.title: Session tomorrow
session_reminder_24hr.body: You have a session scheduled in 24 hours.

session_reminder_1hr.title: Session in 1 hour
session_reminder_1hr.body: Your session starts in 1 hour. Get ready!

session_checkin_reminder.title: Time to check in
session_checkin_reminder.body: Your session is starting — please check in now.

session_checkin_overdue.title: Check-in overdue
session_checkin_overdue.body: Your session has started but you haven't checked in yet.

session_tutor_disconnected.title: Tutor disconnected
session_tutor_disconnected.body: Your tutor lost connection during the session. They may rejoin shortly.

session_no_show.title: Session marked as no-show
session_no_show.body: A participant did not show up for the scheduled session.

payment_confirmed.title: Payment confirmed
payment_confirmed.body: Your payment was received and confirmed. Thank you.

wallet_withdrawal_initiated.title: Withdrawal initiated
wallet_withdrawal_initiated.body: Your withdrawal request has been initiated and is being processed.

withdrawal_failed.title: Withdrawal failed
withdrawal_failed.body: Your withdrawal could not be completed. The funds remain in your wallet.

escrow_released.title: Funds released
escrow_released.body: Funds for your completed session have been released.

refund_issued.title: Refund issued
refund_issued.body: A refund has been issued to you.

payout_account_added.title: Payout account added
payout_account_added.body: A new payout account was added to your profile. If this wasn't you, contact support.

monthly_fee_deducted.title: Monthly fee deducted
monthly_fee_deducted.body: Your monthly platform fee has been deducted.

monthly_fee_failed.title: Monthly fee payment failed
monthly_fee_failed.body: We could not collect your monthly platform fee. Please top up your wallet.

payment_reconciliation_pending.title: Payment under review
payment_reconciliation_pending.body: Your payment is being reconciled. We'll confirm it shortly.

lesson_awaiting_confirmation.title: Confirm your lesson
lesson_awaiting_confirmation.body: A completed lesson is awaiting your confirmation.

lesson_auto_confirmed.title: Lesson auto-confirmed
lesson_auto_confirmed.body: The lesson was automatically confirmed after the review window closed.

dispute_opened.title: Dispute opened
dispute_opened.body: A dispute has been opened on one of your sessions.

dispute_tutor_response_reminder.title: Dispute response needed
dispute_tutor_response_reminder.body: A dispute is awaiting your response. Please reply before the deadline.

dispute_resolved.title: Dispute resolved
dispute_resolved.body: The dispute has been resolved. Check the outcome in the app.

dispute_escalated.title: Dispute escalated
dispute_escalated.body: The dispute has been escalated to the Mentora team for review.

review_window_opened.title: Leave a review
review_window_opened.body: Your session is complete — share your experience with a review.

review_response_submitted.title: Response to your review
review_response_submitted.body: A response was posted to your review.

account_flagged.title: Account flagged
account_flagged.body: Your account has been flagged for review. Some features may be limited.

reauth_required.title: Please sign in again
reauth_required.body: For your security, you need to sign in again.

support_ticket_opened.title: Support ticket created
support_ticket_opened.body: Your support ticket was created. We'll get back to you soon.

support_ticket_response.title: Support replied
support_ticket_response.body: There's a new reply on your support ticket.

support_ticket_resolved.title: Support ticket resolved
support_ticket_resolved.body: Your support ticket has been marked as resolved.

material_removed.title: Material removed
material_removed.body: One of your learning materials was removed following a review.

material_access_granted.title: New material available
material_access_granted.body: You've been granted access to new learning material.

platform_outage_refund.title: Refund for service interruption
platform_outage_refund.body: A session affected by a platform outage has been refunded.

scheduled_maintenance.title: Scheduled maintenance
scheduled_maintenance.body: Mentora will be briefly unavailable for scheduled maintenance.

admin_review_required.title: Account review required
admin_review_required.body: A suspended account needs manual review before its bookings or escrow funds can be resolved.
